blocks.content: Daisy was still up when her phone lit with Ryan's goodnight text. She answered it. Set the phone down.
She opened MySpace the way she did most nights. She went down the left panel. Eli's profile. Savannah's. She got to Kit's.
She didn't click play. She just sat there reading the title in the small font beside the player. Molly. She read it again. The house was quiet. Just the screen and that word.
She looked at his top eight. Eli in the first slot. Her name second. Same as always, same as it had been since he made the profile.
